title: Configure GitHub rulesets for release/* branches and create RELEASING.md

comments.author: maxine--plan-050
comments.content: Covers REQ-7, AC-13. Two parts: (1) GitHub ruleset allowing direct push to release/* while requiring CI-passing PR to main (~GitHub UI), (2) docs/RELEASING.md documenting the release flow (~60 lines). docs/ directory must be created (only docs_src/ exists). Low risk.
